title: Ponnum Poovum
subTitle: Dasan falls in love with Subhadra while providing her refuge after being deserted by her husband. Later, he discovers, her husband was looking for her after being released from jail.

title: Aanakkorumma
subTitle: Bindu's life is in danger when she witnesses two thieves steal the idol of a deity from a temple. However, Manikandan, her elephant, protects her from harm.

title: Ganagandharvan
subTitle: Kalasadhan Ullas is an aspiring stage singer looking for his big break. However, his life is turned upside down when an opportunistic woman and her father target him for a nefarious purpose.

title: Doctor Live
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Golanthara Vartha
subTitle: Rameshan Nair, a grocery shop owner, fights against corruption in his village. He gets Rajani fired from her job, but realises his mistake and tries to get the job and accommodation back for her.

title: Oliyambukal
subTitle: A man decides to avenge the death of his father. He makes up his mind to adopt all possible means to satiate his vengeance.

title: Napoleon
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Aalibabayum Aarara Kallanmarum
subTitle: Diwakaran, a thief, steals jewellery from Aravindakshan, a school teacher. Jayashankar, a police officer, is appointed to investigate the case who in reality is Diwakaran's brother-in-law.

title: Kerala State Lottery Result
subTitle: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: Kerala State Lottery Result
subTitle: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: Ennu Ninte Moideen
subTitle: In the 1960's, when inter-religious marriages were still taboo, Moideen and Kanchanamala fall in love. Even after being forced to part ways, the two lovers fight for their undying love.

title: Oppam
subTitle: Jayaraman, a liftman and caretaker, relies on his non-visual senses and martial arts expertise to protect a little girl from a vengeful ex-con who is out to settle an old score.

title: C.I.D Unnikrishnan B.A. Bed
subTitle: Trainee detectives Unnikrishnan, Prem and Ommen try their best to outdo each other and investigate a case in order to get employed at a private detective agency.

title: Prem Nazirine Kanmanilla
subTitle: A group of youngsters, who are frustrated with the unjust society, decide to abduct the popular Malayalam actor Prem Nazir to express their anger.

title: Engane Nee Marakkum
subTitle: Friends Shambhu and Premkumar fall in love with the same girl, Shobha, and are unaware about it. Matters become more complex when another person also begins to woo her.

title: Artham
subTitle: Narendran agrees to help Janardhan live a free life by going to prison in his place. However, when he comes to know that Janardhan has mysteriously died, he sets out to get revenge.

title: Doctor Live
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Pattam Pole
subTitle: Karthi and Riya, from two different religions, fall in love. Fearing their parents' disapproval of their inter-religious relationship, they elope to Ooty but return after a heated argument.

title: Malabaril Ninnoru Manimaaran
subTitle: Meenu, a young woman, is stuck between her divorced parents who want to marry her off to a man of their individual choice. However, her life takes a turn when Balan enters the scene.

title: Kaathil Oru Kinnaram
subTitle: Hari is dejected when he learns that he cannot marry his lover until her elder sister is married off first. Desperate, he enlists the help of a marriage broker to find a suitable match.

title: Ponmuttayidunna tharavu
subTitle: Bhaskaran, a goldsmith, is madly in love with Snehalatha, the daughter of astrologer, Panicker. When he asks for her hand in marriage, to his shock, she denies their love affair.

title: Kerala State Lottery Result
subTitle: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: Kerala State Lottery Result
subTitle: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: Agrajan
subTitle: Aravindan, a journalist, moves to a new city when he gets a high-paid job. However, his life changes when he finds himself caught in the rivalry between two leading newspaper publishers.

title: Achaneyanenikkishtam
subTitle: Battling financial hardship, a lorry driver navigates life's obstacles as he strives to give his son the best education.

title: Oru Maravathoor Kanavu
subTitle: Michael and his family buy a farm that is coveted by a rich man, who makes life difficult for him. Thereafter, Michael's brother, Chandy, comes to support him.

title: Aa Divasam
subTitle: When an honest doctor tries to stop a burglary, his entire family is killed. Balachandra, a fierce police officer, comes to his rescue and helps him fight for justice.

title: Samrambham
subTitle: After stealing some diamonds, a thief is wounded while trying to double-cross his gang but before dying, he leaves behind some clues that Vasu and Raghavan try to decode.

title: Vishnulokam
subTitle: Circus performer Sankunni's heart is captured by village belle, Savithrikutty. However, this romantic pursuit is complicated by a rival's sinister intentions, testing Sankunni's resolve and talents.

title: Doctor Live
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Oru Yathramozhi
subTitle: A vengeful son's search for his estranged father leads to unexpected complications when he finds himself growing close to a government contractor.

title: Keerthanam
subTitle: Mathukutty and Kariya's families are well known rivals in a small village. Subsequently, a series of unexpected events follow when they both try to plot against each other.

title: Kashmeeram
subTitle: A group of terrorists kills the Indian Home Secretary Rajan Varma's nephew. NSG Officer Shyam is appointed to protect Rajan's sister Usha and her daughter.

title: Joseph
subTitle: Following the death of his ex-wife, a retired police officer, who is known for his investigative prowess, unexpectedly gets pulled into a criminal case involving organ harvesting.

title: Kerala State Lottery Result
subTitle: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: Kerala State Lottery Result
subTitle: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: Take Off
subTitle: Sameera, an Indian nurse working in Iraq, and her colleagues are held hostage by terrorists. Indian ambassador Manoj uses his wit and shrewdness to rescue them and get them out of the country alive.

title: MLA Mani Patham Classum Gusthiyum
subTitle: Manikandan is devastated when his sister, Meenakshi, commits suicide after getting raped by Varkey, an evil politician, and sets out to take revenge on him.

title: June
subTitle: June, a teenager, believes that there is nothing remarkable about her. She experiences adolescent crushes, handles heartbreaks and fights insecurities as she grows into a mature and confident woman.
